# is-windows-broken.com

> Free Windows patch status lookup for admins. Check the latest Patch Tuesday and release-health analysis to decide whether Windows rollout looks safe, cautionary, or blocked.

## API
- Endpoint: https://api.is-windows-broken.com/api/v1/patch-status
- Method: GET
- Auth: none, free, no key required
- Response: JSON. Includes recent cached analyses, overall status, rollout guidance, and per-release summaries.

## Examples
- https://api.is-windows-broken.com/api/v1/patch-status

## Notes
The site summarizes public Microsoft release-health information into operational guidance. Always validate patching decisions against official Microsoft documentation and your own testing.
